title: 3 Piece Mixing Bowl Set Non-Slip Baking Cooking Food Preparation 3 Sizes Pack Pink Grey White
features: PRODUCT INFO: Grey large bowl: 23cm x 13cm (2.5L). Pink medium bowl 21cm x 13cm (2L), White small bowl has a white finish and is 19cm x 13cm (1.5L). Material: PP.
WHAT'S INCLUDED: The set includes 3 x Mixing Bowl - 1 x Large Grey, 1 x Medium Pink and 1 x Small White.

PERFECT PREPARATION: Our three-piece mixing bowl set is ideal for all your food preparation needs. Whether you're mixing the batter, making a salad or proving a bread loaf, our versatile bowls are perfect for everyday use. The bowls are stackable - ideal for space-saving storage. Each bowl also has a spouted edge which makes them great for pouring mixed batters and sauces.
NON SLIP BASE: Each mixing bowl has a non-stick base, which makes them great for any vigorous mixing as you can be sure your bowl won't slip or slide over your kitchen work surface.
CONVENIENT AND PRACTICAL: The bowls are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning and can be stored in the fridge or freezer to keep salad and leftovers fresh.
